name: pump
description: Design launch momentum before a project goes live. Optimize first-day release logic, trigger sequencing, and attention concentration.
author: agenticio

capabilities.launch_diagnosis: Diagnose weak launch structure before release
capabilities.trigger_sequencing: Design pre-launch, launch, and post-launch trigger flow
capabilities.momentum_curve_design: Map first-day release momentum and attention timing
capabilities.launch_refinement: Turn flat launches into more concentrated momentum events
